changes.comment: fix: dropdown-style overlays (select, combobox, menu, date-picker) now auto-detect the nearest clipping ancestor as their flip/shift boundary (via orbit's getClippingAncestorRect) instead of only the page viewport, and auto-correct for any ancestor establishing a position:fixed containing block (via orbit's getContainingBlock) — fixes ore-date-picker's calendar overhanging or mispositioning inside a dialog
